ShortDescription.Value: Auto-Clean garbage OR use Trash Boss = Self manage trucks + facilities

Publish.LongDescription:
**Magic Garbage + Trash Boss**
Two ways to handle garbage, a Status Report option, and all new POWER Users section for experiments. ---
### OPTION 1 AUTO CLEAN - ✅ **Total Magic On** - Removes all garbage automatically. - Garbage warning icons cleared. - Mod does not stop Garbage system; cleanup is just very fast.
### OPTION 2 SELF MANAGE - ✅ **Trash Boss On** - Keep vanilla garbage gameplay, and directly adjust garbage values. - Adjust garbage trucks, facilities, etc., to reduce traffic and service strain. - 🚚 Great for players who still want to see trucks driving around, with fewer problems.
**Priority Assist (lightweight)** - Watches for buildings over **7t** garbage. - Helps badly overloaded buildings get reached sooner. - This is a nudge that works over time, not a hard route override.
**Helper buttons** - [Game Defaults] = reset all sliders to 100% (pure vanilla). - [Recommended] = suggested preset values for easy management. - Standard Trash Boss buttons do not change Power User section.
### STATUS Report - Real garbage stats help show what is happening. - Lean: status does not run in-city per frame; runs in Options menu for best performance to not affect gameplay. - Detailed log button writes even more detailed notes in the Log file for reference.
### OPTIONAL POWER USER - Not needed for most players; allows advanced tuning and experimentation. - Most cities work well just using **Trash Boss + Priority Assist**. - Let the city run about **1 in-game month** before judging results. - Only tweak Power User if the standard Trash Boss controls are not enough.
**Power User controls** - Dispatch Request Threshold + Pickup Threshold - **Pickup** cannot be higher than **Dispatch Request**. - Garbage Happiness Baseline + Garbage Happiness Step - Garbage Accumulation Rate (not needed for most cities, this is a powerful adjustment, use with caution)
Higher thresholds can reduce truck traffic, but too high can also lead to health and happiness issues from high garbage levels. Power User is useful for experimenting and digging into how the game garbage systems behave.
#### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
---
### Compatibility - Safe to remove any time. - Does not use Harmony patch; designed to be lightweight for the best performance.
---
### Credits - RiverMochi - author - Thanks to Wayz for inspiration on the original Magical Garbage mod - yenyang - code review, tech advice - Necko1996 - testing, screenshots - gagaxm - truck image
#### 11 languages - English, Français French, Deutsch German, Español Spanish, Italiano Italian - 日本語 Japanese, 한국어 Korean, Português Brasil, Polski Polish - 简体中文 Simplified Chinese, 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
Publish.ChangeLog: * added Priority Assist option (lightweight) which helps change priorities when there are buildings with high garbage levels; reduce traffic and improve service efficiency. * added more detailed Status log info to mod Options menu. * updated all locale files. * update images.
